task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Medical Terminology Glossary' is created in the BIO101 course with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Moodle course page for 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) showing a glossary activity named 'Medical Terminology Glossary'. The description 'A collaborative glossary of essential medical and biological terms for nursing students.' should be visible either on the course page or the glossary's main page/settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that duplicate entries are not allowed and the default approval status is set to Yes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the glossary settings page (specifically the 'Entries' section). 'Approved by default' should be set to 'Yes', and 'Allow duplicate entries' should be set to 'No'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Mitochondria' entry has been added with the correct definition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the glossary entries list showing the concept 'Mitochondria'. The definition text must include the keywords 'organelles', 'ATP', and 'energy'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Homeostasis' entry has been added with the correct definition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the glossary entries list showing the concept 'Homeostasis'. The definition text must include the keywords 'constant conditions' and 'internal environment'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Pathogen' entry has been added with the correct definition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the glossary entries list showing the concept 'Pathogen'. The definition text must include the keywords 'disease', 'illness', and 'agent'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Moodle web interface to create the glossary and entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Moodle LMS GUI, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the interaction occurred within the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Moodle (look for Moodle navigation bars, breadcrumbs, and standard Moodle activity icons), not a local text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI to insert entries directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin) or SQL queries in a terminal being used to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course: BIO101. Expected glossary name: 'Medical Terminology Glossary'. Entry 1: 'Mitochondria' (definition must contain 'organelles', 'ATP', 'energy'). Entry 2: 'Homeostasis' (definition must contain 'constant conditions', 'internal environment'). Entry 3: 'Pathogen' (definition must contain 'disease', 'illness', 'agent'). All definitions match authoritative biological sources.
